历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 3825 → 2642 → 3018 → 5135 → 4347, with significant fluctuations in recent years. In 2024, due to the new Gaokao subject grouping, the ranking dropped sharply to 5135, then rebounded to 4347 in 2025. The baseline for 2025 is about 4347. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi from 2021 to 2025 was 208, 208, 207, 207, and 208 respectively, remaining basically stable. The 2026 plan is 210, a slight increase of about 0.96% compared to 2025, which has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 32nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, consistently among the top 35 nationally, making it a top-tier engineering institution. During the 2026 Gaokao cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'significantly negative,' mainly due to a campus voyeurism incident that attracted public attention, which may slightly affect some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (average), with low short video exposure. There are no abnormal historical filing records for South China University of Technology, indicating no signs of a cutoff drop. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 9 disciplines rated A- or above: Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, and Management Science and Engineering A-. Its engineering strength is outstanding and highly aligned with its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently 'highly recommended' from 2024 to 2026, closely matching South China University of Technology's strong disciplines, which helps attract high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.2% from approximately 380,000 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 269,000, an increase of about 3.3%, intensifying competition. Regarding provincial control lines, from 2024 to 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line was about 370–371 points, and the special type enrollment control line was about 495–501 points, remaining basically stable. South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, adjacent to Guangxi, with close geographical distance and similar culture, making it highly attractive to Guangxi candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.1%–2.4% (2021–2025), which is moderately high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4347, a slight enrollment expansion of 0.96% in 2026, an increase of about 3.3% in the total number of Guangxi examinees leading to intensified competition, a slight negative impact from reputation issues, and sustained high popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be slightly lower (harder to enter) than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4387, with a range of 3887–4887.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 4387, with a range of 3887–4887. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 3887) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 top talent classes, excellent talent classes, and flagship Computer Science majors. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 4300–4600) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Electrical Engineering, Automation, and Information Engineering, while also attempting Tier 1 as a reach. Candidates with rankings at the upper end of the range (outside 4800) are advised to use Tier 3 Engineering Pilot Classes (Intelligent Transportation, Advanced Materials, etc.) as safety options, while also trying Tier 2 majors. South China University of Technology excels in engineering, so it is recommended to prioritize majors related to A-class disciplines.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 802 → 726 → 2215 → 1029 → 1200. In 2023, due to the merger of liberal arts batches, there was a significant fluctuation to 2215, while in 2024–2025 it stabilized in the 1000–1200 range. The baseline for 2025 is about 1200. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi from 2021 to 2025 was 31, 31, 32, 32, 32 respectively, and the 2026 plan is 34, an increase of about 6.25% compared to 2025, which is relatively significant and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science ranking, it is 32nd, making it a top national university that is also attractive to liberal arts students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative' (due to a voyeurism incident), which may slightly affect application willingness. Its Douyin popularity is average. There are no abnormal historical admission records. SCUT is primarily engineering-oriented, and among its liberal arts-related disciplines, only Management Science and Engineering (A-) and Business Administration (not individually rated) are associated with liberal arts enrollment majors. The Law category corresponds to the Law discipline (not in the A- and above list).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Law category is 'recommended' but with clear differentiation; Accounting/Financial Management is 'recommended'; Journalism and Communication is 'clearly discouraged'; Business English is 'generally wait-and-see'. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Guangxi is about 123,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 119,000 in 2025. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2024–2025 is about 400–402 points, and the special type enrollment control line is about 518–519 points, basically stable. SCUT is located in Guangzhou, adjacent to Guangxi, and has strong regional appeal to Guangxi liberal arts examinees. Its enrollment proportion in Guangxi History Category is relatively small but stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1200, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 6.25%, the increase in examinees of about 3.3% (expansion rate greater than examinee growth rate, competition slightly eased), the slight negative impact of reputation, and the differentiation in liberal arts major popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will be slightly higher than in 2025 (easier to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is about 1225, with a range of 1041–1409.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 1225, with a range of 1041–1409. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 1041) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Law Category and Economics Category. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 1100–1300) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 Business Administration Category and Accounting. Candidates with rankings at the upper end of the range (outside 1400) are advised to use Tier 3 Administrative Management and Business English as safety options. SCUT has a limited number of liberal arts majors, so attention should be paid to the choice of majors when applying.
